series_metadata.series_description: This series includes but is not limited to: facilities compliance statements, general correspondence, new program applications, certificates of registration, renewal applications, school catalog, new school applications, request for exemption to rules, any other requests or activities of the schools. This file is maintained and updated as long as school is in operation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain original application until school''''s closure then move to closed school file. Retain all other documents for four (4) years or until a school''''s closure and documents are moved to closed school file, Paper: Wastepaper
